hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: Casa Curtos in Real de Catorce offers a ground-floor apartment with one bedroom and one bathroom. The property features a private entrance, tiled floors, and a fully equipped kitchenette with a stovetop, microwave, and kitchenware.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax in the private garden or enjoy the outdoor dining area with patio furniture. The garden provides a peaceful setting with garden views, perfect for unwinding.
Modern Facilities: The apartment includes free WiFi, a tea and coffee maker, and a dining table. Additional amenities include a hairdryer, free toiletries, and a wardrobe, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Guest Services: The host offers a highly rated breakfast, providing fresh fruits, chocolates, or cookies each morning.

hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Hotel Amor y Paz in Real de Catorce offers a unique stay within a historic building. Guests enjoy garden views and a sun terrace, complemented by a serene outdoor seating area.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms with walk-in showers, balconies, and garden or mountain views. Additional amenities include free WiFi, tea and coffee makers, and work desks.
Dining Experience: A breakfast buffet with local specialities, warm dishes, cheese, fruits, and juice is served daily. Vegetarian options are available, and room service provides added convenience.
Convenient Services: The hotel offers a 24-hour front desk, concierge service, and tour desk. Additional facilities include a games room, bicycle parking, and full-day security.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel La Tarjea in Real de Catorce offers family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and mountain views. Each room includes a work desk, sofa bed, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a sun terrace, outdoor seating area, and picnic spots. The hotel provides free on-site private parking, a tour desk, and luggage storage.
Convenient Services: Private check-in and check-out, concierge service, daily housekeeping, and room service ensure a pleasant stay. Free toiletries and a tea and coffee maker enhance comfort.
Prime Location: Located on a quiet street, the hotel is highly rated for its convenient location, room comfort, and cleanliness.
